mapper.select: SELECT emp_no AS empNo, name AS empName, status, LTRIM(RTRIM(password)) AS password, role, position, locked, login_fail_count AS failCount FROM dbo.employee_52 WHERE emp_no = #{empNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE dbo.employee_52 SET password = #{encodedPassword}, login_fail_count = 0, locked = 0 WHERE emp_no = #{empNo}
mapper.select: SELECT emp_no AS empNo, name AS empName, dept_id AS deptId, status, login_fail_count AS failCount, locked AS locked FROM dbo.employee_52 ORDER BY emp_no ASC

SELECT e.emp_no AS empNo, e.dept_id AS deptId, d.name AS deptName, e.name AS name, e.status AS status,
e.position AS position, e.role AS role,
e.job_id AS jobId, j.name AS jobName,
e.email AS email, e.phone AS phone, e.hire_date AS hireDate,
e.level_id AS levelId, l.name AS levelName,
e.resign_date AS resignDate, e.locked AS locked,
CASE WHEN e.resign_date IS NOT NULL AND e.resign_date <= CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
AND e.status <> 'RESIGNED'
THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS overdueResignFlag
FROM dbo.employee_52 e
LEFT JOIN dbo.department_52 d ON e.dept_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN dbo.code_common_52 j ON e.job_id = j.id
LEFT JOIN dbo.code_common_52 l ON e.level_id = l.id
e.emp_no = #{keyword} OR e.name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%'
AND e.dept_id = #{deptId}
AND e.status = #{status}
ORDER BY e.emp_no DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT e.emp_no AS empNo, e.name AS name, e.dept_id AS deptId, e.status AS status, e.locked AS locked, e.role AS role, e.email AS email, e.phone AS phone,
e.level_id AS levelId, l.name AS levelName,
e.job_id AS jobId, j.name AS jobName,
e.hire_date AS hireDate, e.resign_date AS resignDate, e.position AS position
FROM dbo.employee_52 e
LEFT JOIN dbo.code_common_52 j ON e.job_id = j.id
LEFT JOIN dbo.code_common_52 l ON e.level_id = l.id
WHERE e.emp_no = #{empNo}
